summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Calendar (/calendar) and Report Builder (/reports) pages. Both new pages load correctly with all features working. Calendar displays February 2026 by default with monthly grid, color-coded severity indicators, clickable dates that open detail sheets, and Upcoming Deadlines sidebar. Report Builder shows all 3 sections (Compliance Summary, Obligations by Status, Obligations by Category) with live preview, toggleable sections, and working PDF export. Dashboard navigation includes working Calendar and Reports links. All logos at 3x size (h-24 = 96px).

console_warnings.message: Encountered two children with the same key (mining-base-metals-*). Keys should be unique.
console_warnings.impact: No functional impact - cosmetic warning only

passed_tests: Calendar Page (/calendar): Loads successfully with 'Compliance Calendar' header
Calendar Page: Displays February 2026 as current month by default
Calendar Page: Logo displays at h-24 (96px = 3x size)
Calendar Page: Previous month navigation button works (navigates to January 2026)
Calendar Page: Next month navigation button works (navigates to March 2026)
Calendar Page: Today button navigates back to February 2026
Calendar Page: Shows 42 calendar day buttons in monthly grid
Calendar Page: Severity legend shows Critical (red), High (amber), Medium (blue), Low (green)
Calendar Page: Color-coded severity indicators on calendar dates - 3 Critical, 6 High, 2 Medium found
Calendar Page: Clickable dates with obligations open detail sheet
Calendar Page: Detail sheet shows obligation count (e.g., '6 obligation(s) due')
Calendar Page: Upcoming Deadlines sidebar shows 22 deadline items for next 30 days
Calendar Page: Clicking sidebar deadline item opens detail sheet
Report Builder Page (/reports): Loads successfully with 'Report Builder' header
Report Builder Page: Logo displays at h-24 (96px = 3x size)
Report Builder Page: Shows 3 section checkboxes (Compliance Summary, Obligations by Status, Obligations by Category)
Report Builder Page: All 3 sections selected by default
Report Builder Page: Live preview shows all 3 sections when selected
Report Builder Page: Unchecking section hides it from preview
Report Builder Page: Toggle Preview button shows/hides preview
Report Builder Page: Data Summary card shows Total Obligations, Compliance Score, Critical Items, Categories
Report Builder Page: Export PDF Report button is enabled and clickable
Report Builder Page: PDF export triggers download with filename 'compliance-report-2026-02-09.pdf'
Report Builder Page: Back to Dashboard button present
Dashboard: Calendar navigation link present in header
Dashboard: Reports navigation link present in header
Dashboard: Calendar link navigates to /calendar page
Dashboard: Reports link navigates to /reports page
critical_code_review_comments: React key warning: Calendar page generates duplicate keys (mining-base-metals-*) when rendering obligations. This is a minor code quality issue but doesn't affect functionality.
seed_data_creation: Used existing Test Mining Corp data from previous tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar (/calendar) and Report Builder (/reports) pages fully functional. Calendar shows obligations by due date in monthly grid with color-coded severity (red=critical, amber=high, blue=medium, green=low). Clickable dates open detail sheet. Report Builder allows selecting 3 sections (summary, status, category) with live preview and PDF export via jspdf+jspdf-autotable. MOCKED APIs: Calendar obligations fallback to getMockObligations(), Report data fallback to getMockObligations().
mocked_api_note: Backend serves mock data when database is empty. Calendar and Reports use getMockObligations() as fallback.
